title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Monpay Ltd
body: "Application number 5315  Applicant Moonpay Inc objected to the name used by Monpay Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 22 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Monpay Ltd is changed to 12280273, Ltd. "
